purpose: Non-secret Railway Postgres query metadata for Vault Provisioner-backed verification. No credentials.

callable_interface.name: vault-provisioner-query
callable_interface.notes: Harness stages scratch/provision_summary_nonsecret.json and scratch/vault_provisioner_interface.md for the tester. The CLI reads the Vault consumer key only from the standard host path (outside the repo; mode 0600). Fail closed on missing_consumer_key / vault_locked / consumer_not_armed / vault_access_denied. Never prints tokens, passwords, or connection strings.

host_preconditions.consumer_key: installed at standard host path mode 0600 (e.g. ~/.config/ratchet/vault_consumer.key); never committed or written into TESTLOG/verdict
host_preconditions.status_preflight: vault-provisioner-query status must report ok, consumer_key_present, armed, vault_unlocked

connection_method.name: vault-provisioner-lease-psql
steps: Confirm callable interface: `which vault-provisioner-query` (or vault-consumer) and `vault-provisioner-query status` (consumer_key_present + armed + unlocked + lease_api).
register_run for folder=vygo and the mission run_id (performed by the CLI).
Issue a short-lived consumer lease for RAILWAY_TOKEN (provider=railway) via POST /api/consumer/lease (performed by the CLI).
Use Railway GraphQL variables for project_id + environment_id + service_id Postgres-0MtT (performed by the CLI).
Connect with psql to DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL (not the .railway.internal DATABASE_URL) (performed by the CLI).
Release the lease immediately after the SELECT (performed by the CLI).
Never write tokens, passwords, consumer keys, or secret-bearing connection strings into TESTLOG.md, verdicts, or commits.

approved_sql.success_exactly_one: SELECT id::text AS id, full_name, work_email, product_url, message, source, created_at::text AS created_at FROM applications WHERE full_name = 'Ratchet E2E Test' AND work_email = 'e2e-test+<run-marker>@vygo.ai';
approved_sql.success_count: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM applications WHERE full_name = 'Ratchet E2E Test' AND work_email = 'e2e-test+<run-marker>@vygo.ai';
approved_sql.invalid_zero: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM applications WHERE work_email = 'not-an-email';

harness_locations.run_shared_provision_summary: shared/provision_summary.json (non-secret; written by Vault Provisioner + builder enrichment)
harness_locations.tester_scratch_summary: scratch/provision_summary_nonsecret.json (staged by harness each tester run)
harness_locations.tester_scratch_interface: scratch/vault_provisioner_interface.md (staged by harness when CLI is installed)

secrets_policy: This document contains no tokens, passwords, or connection strings. Credentials come exclusively through the Vault Provisioner consumer lease path inside vault-provisioner-query.
